edge_hypothesis: The ema_rsi_atr template is the ONLY template with a built-in ATR volatility expansion gate (ATR > ATR_MA20). This ensures signals fire exclusively during expanding volatility — exactly when wide TP targets have the highest probability of being reached. Previous tests used default narrow R:R (1.5:2.0) producing avg PF=0.97 due to fee drag. Applying the validated tail-harvester concept (extreme R:R 5:1 to 7:1) to this volatility-gated signal tests whether the triple-gate (trend + momentum + volatility expansion) produces sufficient signal quality for wide targets. Testing on ETH/1h to match recent MACD tail harvester success (PF=1.71 on 1h).
invalidation: If PF < 1.0 across all variants with 30+ trades, the ema_rsi_atr signal quality is too low for tail-harvesting even with volatility expansion gating. Deprioritize template entirely.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_vol_expansion_7to1
variants.description: Triple-gate tail harvester: EMA trend + RSI momentum (tightened to 45-65) + ATR volatility expansion, with 7:1 R:R. Hypothesis: tighter RSI bands filter for stronger momentum confirmation, volatility gate ensures only expanding-vol entries, 7:1 R:R overcomes fee drag.
entry_long: RSI_14 between 45 and 65 (momentum confirmed but not overbought)
entry_short: RSI_14 between 35 and 55 (momentum confirmed but not oversold)
exit_rules: TP at 7.0x ATR from entry (tail harvester target)
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR from entry
Exit on opposite EMA crossover signal
risk_rules: Stop: 2.0x ATR (wide enough to avoid noise, validated minimum 1.5x)
Volatility expansion gate (ATR > ATR_MA20) is template-native

components.notes: RSI_14 momentum gate, tightened 45-65 long / 35-55 short

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_vol_expansion_10to1
variants.description: Extreme tail harvester variant: same triple-gate but 10:1 R:R (2.0x stop, 10.0x TP). Tests the upper bound of the tail-harvesting concept with volatility expansion gating. If vol-expansion signals are truly high-quality, the extreme target should capture large moves with low win rate but high expectancy.
entry_long: RSI_14 between 45 and 65 (momentum confirmed but not overbought)
entry_short: RSI_14 between 35 and 55 (momentum confirmed but not oversold)
exit_rules: TP at 10.0x ATR from entry (extreme tail harvester)
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR from entry
Exit on opposite EMA crossover signal
risk_rules: TP: 10.0x ATR (5:1 R:R extreme tail harvester)
Expect low win rate (~15-20%) but high avg-win/avg-loss ratio

components.notes: RSI_14 momentum gate, tightened 45-65 long / 35-55 short

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_vol_expansion_5to1_default_rsi
variants.description: Control variant: default RSI bands (40-70 long, 30-60 short) with moderate 5:1 R:R. Tests whether the ATR volatility gate alone is sufficient for tail-harvesting without tightening RSI. More signals expected = higher trade count. If this outperforms the tightened-RSI variants, RSI tightening hurts more than it helps.
exit_rules: TP at 5.0x ATR from entry (moderate tail harvester)
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR from entry
Exit on opposite EMA crossover signal
risk_rules: TP: 5.0x ATR (2.5:1 R:R moderate tail harvester)
Default RSI bands as control comparison
